CustomField.formula: IF ( INCLUDES ( Product_Type__c , "IR35 Contractor Assessment" ), "IR35 Contractor Assessment; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Product_Type__c , "IR35 Health Check" ), "IR35 Health Check; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Product_Type__c , "IR35 Protect Essential" ), "IR35 Protect Essential; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Product_Type__c , "IR35 Protect Insurance" ), "IR35 Protect Insurance; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Product_Type__c , "IR35 Protect Premium" ), "IR35 Protect Premium; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Product_Type__c , "IR35 Protect Standalone" ), "IR35 Protect Standalone; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Product_Type__c , "IR35 Tool" ), "IR35 Tool; ",null )
CustomField.label: Product Type Formula
